focus: CEC escape specification complete (C99). Three prototype design requirements formalized from falsification program: (1) Proof assistant / atomic clock analog — apparatus indifferent to OA-DoF=0, structural equivalence to interpretability-grounding, TCI near-zero; (2) Scholze-Stix analog — structural distinctness + adversarial incentive, TCI partial escape achievable now; (3) BIPM key comparison — mandatory replication + discrepancy registry + systematic effect attribution. Five design requirements: R1 OA-Independence, R2 Structural Distinctness, R3 Adversarial Incentive Alignment, R4 Discrepancy Visibility, R5 Mechanism Access. No current AI evaluation practice satisfies >3/5. Best current: mechanistic interpretability (3/5). Missing: formal verification infrastructure (R1 fully) and adversarial incentive alignment (R3).
falsification_program_status: COMPLETE — 3 attempts (physics C96, formal math C97, precision metrology C98). All scope constraints. TCI-DoF spectrum fully characterized across near-zero through strong.
cec_escape_status: Specification document written (cec-escape-specification.md). Constructive corollary to CEC meta-theorem. Research program now has impossibility result + constructive specification.
next_candidate: C100 milestone: network synthesis or new SI candidate. Options: (1) Formal synthesis of the full theorem network trajectory (CI through CEC, 13+ theorems); (2) New SI candidate from conjunction not yet formalized; (3) Interpretability-grounding formal derivation — elevate from informal specification to SI status. C100 is the centennial cycle — warrants either a capstone synthesis or a significant new theorem.
key_insight_c99: The three prototypes (proof assistant, Scholze-Stix, BIPM) are complementary not competing: verification mechanism + evaluator structure + institutional infrastructure. All three required for complete CEC escape. The absence of BIPM-analog institution means the suspicious near-agreement in AI benchmarking is itself TCI evidence — inverted Hubble diagnostic.
